---
name: 🚀 Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for LeadAI Platform
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement, needs-triage
assignees: ''
---

## 💡 Problem Description

A clear and concise description of the problem this feature would solve.

> Example: "I'm always frustrated when I have to manually reassign leads because there's no auto-routing based on geography..."

---

## 🛠️ Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Include as much detail as possible about the expected behavior.

---

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered, and why the proposed solution is preferable.

---

## 📚 Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, examples, or references about the feature request here.

- [ ] I have searched for similar feature requests
- [ ] This feature aligns with the project's core principles
- [ ] I am willing to help implement this feature

---

## 🏷️ Priority Suggestion

- [ ] 🔴 Critical — Blocking workflow or major user impact
- [ ] 🟠 High — Significant improvement to core functionality
- [ ] 🟡 Medium — Nice to have, improves UX
- [ ] 🟢 Low — Minor improvement or polish
